storyboard.content: My fingers and wrists are stiff and achy, especially when I first wake up in the morning
The symptoms have been slowly getting worse over the past 3 months
The stiffness lasts about 30 to 45 minutes after I get up before it eases off
My finger joints look a little puffy or swollen
The stiffness and aching are mild and haven't stopped me from doing daily things, but they are getting in the way
I have not had any fever along with these symptoms
I'm a 48-year-old woman with no major health problems in the past
